safety.title: Electronic Stability Program (ESP®)
safety.content: ESP® can detect a wheel slip and helps you stay in directional control.

safety.title: 6 Airbags
safety.content: A cabin that prioritizes safety with dual front, side and curtain airbags.

safety.title: Braking System (ABS, EBD & BA)
safety.content: Excellent control to keep you safe wherever you drive.

safety.title: Suzuki's TECT Concept
safety.content: The body embodies Suzuki's TECT concept for lightness and occupant safety.

safety.title: Hill Hold Control
safety.content: Easily navigate through inclines as the system prevents rolling backwards.

performance.title: K15C + Smart Hybrid Vehicle By Suzuki (SHVS)
performance.content: With 1.5 litre engine that produces eco-friendly and optimum torque output.
